text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp season has arrived, and we're
currently riding the bus there.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for worryin' ya before, Trainer. Mom's doin'
good now.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Man... Y'know, she loves melons, so I sent one
hopin' it'd perk her up, and apparently she
scoffed it down in one go. All's well that ends
well, I guess.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While Tamamo Cross's mother back home seems
to be doing fine...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Geez... This highway sure is busy... Our bus's
surrounded by cars...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
(What if we get into some kinda accident or
somethin'?)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross reflexively reaches for my arm and
grips it tight.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't think too much if it'd been another
Umamusume, but having someone as tough as
Tamamo Cross clinging to me for support....

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's definitely not true. There's only one thing I
can do in a situation like this...
choice_data_list: This summer, let's sort this out once and for all.
This summer, let's sort this out once and for all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The accident was just that—an unfortunate
accident. But... that's not going to assuage
Tamamo Cross's anxieties. We need to address
her feelings properly.
